# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: my-app
version: 0.1.0
description: Helm chart for our application deployment with dynamic resource allocation

resources:
  - deployments.apps
  - services.clusterip
  - services.loadbalancer
  - ingresses.extensions
  - configmaps.core
  - secrets.generic

tests:
  - name: liveness
    command:
      - cat
      - /app/health/liveness
    initialDelaySeconds: 15
    periodSeconds: 10

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: my-app
          image: my-app:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "my-app.fullname" . }}
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: {{ include "my-app.name" . }}
---
